        + u^32*(12*u^31 + 26*u^30 + u^29 - u^28 + 243*u^26 + 1433*u^25 + 2259*u^24 + 256*u^23 - 1889*u^22 - 957*u^21 + 4144*u^20 + 11393*u^19 + 7838*u^18 - 7626*u^17 - 17631*u^16 - 12771*u^15 + 3293*u^14 + 9117*u^13 - 1043*u^12+ 1001*u^11 - 818*u^10 - 561*u^9 + 1438*u^8 - 784*u^7 + 430*u^6 - 82*u^5 + 47*u^4 + 8*u^3 - 25*u^2 + 3*u - 1)*v^5

        - u^41*(u^17 - u^15 + 2*u^12 + 9*u^11 - 66*u^10 - 158*u^9 - 104*u^8 + 4*u^7 + 15*u^6 + 10*u^5 - u^4 - 10*u^3 + u^2 - u + 1)*v^2
        - u^45*(12*u^6 + 14*u^5 + u^4 - u^3 - u + 1)*v
        + u^51;
x:=u/v;

10*x^38-26050057*u^10*x^37+16041795*u^10*x^36+20575269*u^10*x^35-42885887*u^10*x^34+20786117*u^10*x^33+17003525*u^10*x^32-23833898*u^10*x^31-806201*u^10*x^30+18789364*u^10*x^29-12563397*u^10*x^28-541475*u^10*x^27+4716646*u^10*x^26-2095082*u^10*x^25-312543*u^10*x^24+600875*u^10*x^23-202917*u^10*x^22+22022*u^10*x^21-60*u^9*x^52-150*u^9*x^51-70*u^9*x^50+620*u^9*x^49-3110*u^9*x^48+4590*u^9*x^47-11890*u^9*x^46-34340*u^9*x^45+102900*u^9*x^44+72640*u^9*x^43-563830*u^9*x^42+1063210*u^9*x^41-65750*u^9*x^40-4141890*u^9*x^39+8114210*u^9*x^38-3324070*u^9*x^37-10354330*u^9*x^36+17534180*u^9*x^35-6783700*u^9*x^34-9844000*u^9*x^33+10772770*u^9*x^32+3998170*u^9*x^31-13397000*u^9*x^30+8112200*u^9*x^29+817510*u^9*x^28-3606220*u^9*x^27+1681420*u^9*x^26+116520*u^9*x^25-366090*u^9*x^24+115570*u^9*x^23-10010*u^9*x^22+27*u^8*x^52-144*u^8*x^50+1017*u^8*x^49-2466*u^8*x^48+4653*u^8*x^47+10701*u^8*x^46-22194*u^8*x^45-15057*u^8*x^44+108252*u^8*x^43-261288*u^8*x^42+4680*u^8*x^41+1219599*u^8*x^40-2287530*u^8*x^39+554301*u^8*x^38+4063392*u^8*x^37-6474402*u^8*x^36+2330433*u^8*x^35+4145328*u^8*x^34-3962115*u^8*x^33-3128571*u^8*x^32+7411896*u^8*x^31-4314366*u^8*x^30-757260*u^8*x^29+2461329*u^8*x^28-1259181*u^8*x^27+40185*u^8*x^26+180144*u^8*x^25-54639*u^8*x^24+3276*u^8*x^23-8*u^7*x^52+40*u^7*x^51-160*u^7*x^50+280*u^7*x^49-16*u^7*x^48-3512*u^7*x^47+2448*u^7*x^46+5152*u^7*x^45-25432*u^7*x^44+68688*u^7*x^43+7728*u^7*x^42-334776*u^7*x^41+598264*u^7*x^40-45960*u^7*x^39-1423216*u^7*x^38+2224816*u^7*x^37-801344*u^7*x^36-1506352*u^7*x^35+1345312*u^7*x^34+1558632*u^7*x^33-3329568*u^7*x^32+1853208*u^7*x^31+645976*u^7*x^30-1523752*u^7*x^29+819184*u^7*x^28-81752*u^7*x^27-75480*u^7*x^26+22328*u^7*x^25-728*u^7*x^24+14*u^6*x^50-91*u^6*x^49+378*u^6*x^48+546*u^6*x^47-1288*u^6*x^46+5005*u^6*x^45-12488*u^6*x^44-8988*u^6*x^43+81263*u^6*x^42-137452*u^6*x^41-21693*u^6*x^40+442778*u^6*x^39-667891*u^6*x^38+223538*u^6*x^37+509824*u^6*x^36-442799*u^6*x^35-586894*u^6*x^34+1224440*u^6*x^33-613746*u^6*x^32-438984*u^6*x^31+800240*u^6*x^30-434126*u^6*x^29+58898*u^6*x^28+27293*u^6*x^27-7875*u^6*x^26+98*u^6*x^25+6*u^5*x^49-120*u^5*x^48-24*u^5*x^47-528*u^5*x^46+1386*u^5*x^45+2820*u^5*x^44-16410*u^5*x^43+28710*u^5*x^42+10614*u^5*x^41-115218*u^5*x^40+169650*u^5*x^39-49476*u^5*x^38-159006*u^5*x^37+142914*u^5*x^36+170976*u^5*x^35-370200*u^5*x^34+160158*u^5*x^33+212688*u^5*x^32-339624*u^5*x^31+186210*u^5*x^30-29748*u^5*x^29-8010*u^5*x^28+2238*u^5*x^27-6*u^5*x^26+30*u^4*x^48+75*u^4*x^47-145*u^4*x^46-565*u^4*x^45+3210*u^4*x^44-5850*u^4*x^43-3040*u^4*x^42+26040*u^4*x^41-38070*u^4*x^40+8400*u^4*x^39+46890*u^4*x^38-44735*u^4*x^37-40195*u^4*x^36+98040*u^4*x^35-39905*u^4*x^34-74940*u^4*x^33+118280*u^4*x^32-67115*u^4*x^31+12360*u^4*x^30+1690*u^4*x^29-455*u^4*x^28-12*u^3*x^48+128*u^3*x^46-564*u^3*x^45+840*u^3*x^44+1032*u^3*x^43-5220*u^3*x^42+7092*u^3*x^41-28*u^3*x^40-12556*u^3*x^39+11316*u^3*x^38+9468*u^3*x^37-24412*u^3*x^36+10144*u^3*x^35+21828*u^3*x^34-35416*u^3*x^33+20784*u^3*x^32-4264*u^3*x^31-216*u^3*x^30+56*u^3*x^29+3*u^2*x^48-15*u^2*x^47+48*u^2*x^46-30*u^2*x^45-240*u^2*x^44+732*u^2*x^43-819*u^2*x^42-486*u^2*x^41+2424*u^2*x^40-1722*u^2*x^39-2286*u^2*x^38+4977*u^2*x^37-1587*u^2*x^36-5799*u^2*x^35+8844*u^2*x^34-5157*u^2*x^33+1104*u^2*x^32+12*u^2*x^31-3*u^2*x^30-4*u*x^46+20*u*x^45-44*u*x^44+30*u*x^43+100*u*x^42-248*u*x^41+104*u*x^40+352*u*x^39-582*u*x^38-34*u*x^37+1168*u*x^36-1538*u*x^35+858*u*x^34-182*u*x^33+x^44-5*x^43+8*x^42-18*x^40+19*x^39+34*x^38-114*x^37+129*x^36-68*x^35+14*x^34)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
